titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Office of the Dean of Women records37-2-260

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Office of the Dean of Women records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Dean of Women

did.abstract: Correspondence and subject files of the Dean of Women.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and subject files of the Dean of Women.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Office of the Dean of Women records, #37-2-260. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

did.unittitle: Association to Aid Scientific Research for Women,
Cornell United Religious Work, Freshman Camp (Women),
National Association of Deans of Women,
Miss Fitch - Personal speaking engagements; letters from former CU students; one letter from Mary Donlon, (11-23-1934),
Housing for Colored Women Students (infor on rooming or apts. downtown houses),
Miss Nye - Personal (mainly letters written by Miss Fitch after Miss Nye became ill),
Reports of the Dean of Women,
Folder has no title, but seems to concern expenses in general,
Medical Dept. Dr Young's Nutrition Project,
Furniture for #1 Sage Ave. Miss Brummett,
Women's Self-Govt. Association Executive Committee Minutes,
Folder without title (contains a few prints),
Curtiss-Wright Program: ind. list of "cadettes", mainly re: housing in Comstock A&B,
Women's Self-Govt. Association Judiciary Committee Minutes,
Summer Session Student Problems and Interviews,
Student Affairs Committee Correspondence and Memoranda,
Women's Self-Govt Association Residence Council Minutes,
History and Information on Growth and Development of W.S.G.A. rules,
Women's Self-Govt Association Residence Council Minutes,
Women's Self-Govt Association Residence Council Minutes,
Women's Self-Govt Association Residence Council Minutes,
Chairman of Activities Report; Cynthia Foster,
Women's Self-Govt Association Executive Committee Minutes,
Women's Self-Govt Association Junior Advisory Committee,
Women's Self-Govt Association Executive Committee Minutes,
VP Training Course and Method of Selection,
Women's Self-Govt Association Residence Council Minutes,
Women's Self-Govt Association House of Representatives,
